description: Print information about blocks. If < range > is not supplied, information for all blocks is provided.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: List FISH extra information. A valid integer index i must be supplied.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Print comprehensive block information. This includes: groups, extras, zone multiplier, number of zones, and edge IDs for each block.

keywords.name: points
keywords.description: Print point IDs for each block.
